input: How many collector accounts were processed in 2025 across both Nova and TPT systems?
query: can.tax_year,             COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) AS master_client,             c.name AS legal_entity,             ct.name as county,             COUNT(can.id) AS processed_collector_accounts,             'nova' AS system_type         FROM nova_collector_account_number can         JOIN nova_property p              ON p.id = can.property_id         JOIN nova_client_property cp              ON cp.property_id = p.id              AND cp.tax_year = can.tax_year         JOIN nova_client c              ON c.id = cp.client_id          JOIN nova_client mc              ON mc.id = c.master_client_id         JOIN nova_county ct              ON ct.id = p.county_id         WHERE processed_at IS NOT NULL           AND p.deleted_at IS NULL           AND cp.tax_year = 2025         GROUP BY              can.tax_year,             COALESCE(mc.name, c.name),             c.name,             ct.name,             system_type          UNION ALL          SELECT              can.taxyear AS tax_year,             COALESCE(le.clientname, le.legalentityname) AS master_client,             le.legalentityname AS legal_entity,             aa.assessorname as county,             COUNT(can.collectoraccountid) AS processed_collector_accounts,             'tpt' AS system_type         FROM tpt_collectoraccounts can         JOIN tpt_assessoraccount_collectoraccount ac              ON ac.collectoraccountid = can.collectoraccountid         JOIN tpt_assessoraccounts aa              ON aa.assessoraccountid = ac.assessoraccountid         JOIN tpt_assessoraccount_property ap              ON ap.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid         JOIN tpt_properties p              ON p.propertyid = ap.propertyid         JOIN tpt_legalentities le              ON le.legalentityid = p.legalentityid         WHERE can.taxyear = 2025           AND can.taxbillstatus = 'Approved'           AND can.isactive = TRUE           AND p.isactive = TRUE           AND le.isactive = TRUE           AND aa.isactive = TRUE         GROUP BY              can.taxyear,             COALESCE(le.clientname, le.legalentityname),             le.legalentityname,             aa.assessorname,             system_type         ORDER BY              processed_collector_accounts desc

metadata.description: Calculates both the number of open renditions and total renditions by each user in each office for each client and legal entity for both system types, Nova and TPT.

input: What are the tax savings and tax values for each client and legal entity in TPT for 2025?
query: WITH ppnotice_base AS (     SELECT         p.propertyid,         aa.assessoraccountid,         pp.ppnoticedetailid,         aa.assessoraccountnumber,         aa.assessorname AS county,         le.clientname AS client,         le.legalentityname as legalentity,         c1.name AS cdp_client,         c.secondary_user AS consultant,         CAST('BPP' AS VARCHAR) AS property_type,         p.stateprovincecode AS state,         aa.taxyear,         aa.estimatedtaxrate,         ppv.noticevaluetype,         pp.noticedate,         pp.isoriginal,         pp.isfinal,         ppv.noticedvalue:: NUMERIC AS noticedvalue,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (             PARTITION BY aa.assessoraccountid,             aa.taxyear,             ppv.noticevaluetype,             pp.isoriginal             ORDER BY                 pp.noticedate ASC         ) AS rn_initial,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (             PARTITION BY aa.assessoraccountid,             aa.taxyear,             ppv.noticevaluetype,             pp.isfinal             ORDER BY                 pp.noticedate DESC         ) AS rn_revised     FROM         main.public.tpt_assessoraccounts aa         JOIN main.public.tpt_assessoraccount_property ap ON ap.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid         JOIN main.public.tpt_properties p ON p.propertyid = ap.propertyid         JOIN main.public.tpt_legalentities le ON le.legalentityid = p.legalentityid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_clients c ON c.clientid = le.clientid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_ppnotices pp ON pp.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_ppnotice_values ppv ON ppv.ppnoticedetailid = pp.ppnoticedetailid         LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1 ON cca1.channel_entry_id = le.clientid         AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'tpt'         LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1 ON c1.id = cca1.client_id     WHERE         aa.isactive = TRUE         AND p.isactive = TRUE         AND le.isactive = TRUE         AND taxyear = 2025         AND aa.assessoraccounttype IN ('Personal Property', 'Pipeline') ), pp_notice_values AS (     SELECT         propertyid,         assessoraccountid,         assessoraccountnumber,         taxyear,         client,         cdp_client,         legalentity,         consultant,         county,         property_type,         state,         estimatedtaxrate,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Market'             AND isoriginal = TRUE             AND rn_initial = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS initial_market_value_temp,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Market'             AND isfinal = TRUE             AND rn_revised = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS revised_market_value,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Taxable'             AND isoriginal = TRUE             AND rn_initial = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS initial_taxable_value,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Taxable'             AND isfinal = TRUE             AND rn_revised = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS revised_taxable_value     FROM         ppnotice_base     GROUP BY         propertyid,         assessoraccountid,         assessoraccountnumber,         taxyear,         consultant,          client,         cdp_client,         legalentity,         county,         property_type,         state,         estimatedtaxrate ), -- RENotices renotice_base AS (     SELECT         p.propertyid,         aa.assessoraccountid,         re.renoticedetailid,         aa.assessoraccountnumber,         aa.assessorname AS county,         le.clientname AS client,         le.legalentityname as legalentity,         c1.name AS cdp_client,         c.secondary_user AS consultant,         CAST('RE' AS VARCHAR) AS property_type,         p.stateprovincecode AS state,         aa.taxyear,         aa.estimatedtaxrate,         rev.noticevaluetype,         re.noticedate,         re.isoriginal,         re.isfinal,         rev.landvalue:: NUMERIC AS noticedvalue,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (             PARTITION BY aa.assessoraccountid,             aa.taxyear,             rev.noticevaluetype,             re.isoriginal             ORDER BY                 re.noticedate ASC         ) AS rn_initial,         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (             PARTITION BY aa.assessoraccountid,             aa.taxyear,             rev.noticevaluetype,             re.isfinal             ORDER BY                 re.noticedate DESC         ) AS rn_revised     FROM         main.public.tpt_assessoraccounts aa         JOIN main.public.tpt_assessoraccount_property ap ON ap.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid         JOIN main.public.tpt_properties p ON p.propertyid = ap.propertyid         JOIN main.public.tpt_legalentities le ON le.legalentityid = p.legalentityid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_clients c ON c.clientid = le.clientid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_renotices re ON re.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid         LEFT JOIN main.public.tpt_renotice_values rev ON rev.renoticedetailid = re.renoticedetailid         LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1 ON cca1.channel_entry_id = le.clientid         AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'tpt'         LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1 ON c1.id = cca1.client_id     WHERE         aa.isactive = TRUE         AND p.isactive = TRUE         AND le.isactive = TRUE         AND taxyear = 2025         AND aa.assessoraccounttype IN (             'Real Estate',             'Mineral',             'Agricultural',             'Rendered Real Estate'         ) ), re_notice_values AS (     SELECT         propertyid,         assessoraccountid,         assessoraccountnumber,         taxyear,         client,         cdp_client,         legalentity,         consultant,         county,         property_type,         state,         estimatedtaxrate,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Market'             AND isoriginal = TRUE             AND rn_initial = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS initial_market_value_temp,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Market'             AND isfinal = TRUE             AND rn_revised = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS revised_market_value,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Taxable'             AND isoriginal = TRUE             AND rn_initial = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS initial_taxable_value,         MAX(             CASE             WHEN noticevaluetype = 'Taxable'             AND isfinal = TRUE             AND rn_revised = 1 THEN noticedvalue END         ) AS revised_taxable_value     FROM         renotice_base     GROUP BY         propertyid,         assessoraccountid,         assessoraccountnumber,         taxyear,         client,         cdp_client,         legalentity,         consultant,         county,         property_type,         state,         estimatedtaxrate ) -- UNION final SELECT     propertyid,     assessoraccountid,     assessoraccountnumber,     county,     client,     cdp_client,     legalentity,     consultant,     property_type,     state,     taxyear,     estimatedtaxrate,     COALESCE(initial_market_value_temp,initial_taxable_value, 0) as initial_market_value,     COALESCE(revised_market_value, initial_market_value) AS revised_market_value,     COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) AS initial_taxable_value,     COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value, 0) AS revised_taxable_value,     ROUND(         COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS initial_tax_due,     ROUND(         COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value, 0) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS revised_tax_due,     ROUND(         (             COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) - COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value, 0)         ) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS tax_savings,     'TPT' AS system_type FROM     pp_notice_values UNION ALL SELECT     propertyid,     assessoraccountid,     assessoraccountnumber,     county,     client,     cdp_client,     legalentity,     consultant,     property_type,     state,     taxyear,     estimatedtaxrate,     COALESCE(initial_market_value_temp,initial_taxable_value, 0) as initial_market_value,     COALESCE(revised_market_value, initial_market_value) AS revised_market_value,     COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) AS initial_taxable_value,     COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value) AS revised_taxable_value,     ROUND(         COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS initial_tax_due,     ROUND(         COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value, 0) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS revised_tax_due,     ROUND(         (             COALESCE(initial_taxable_value, 0) - COALESCE(revised_taxable_value, initial_taxable_value, 0)         ) * estimatedtaxrate,         2     ) AS tax_savings,     'TPT' AS system_type FROM     re_notice_values

metadata.description: Calculate the tax savings for each client and legal entity, as well as the Market values, taxable values and tax values for 2025 for system type TPT.

input: Which users have the most missing tax values for 2025 for Nova System?
query: SELECT   u.id AS user_id,   u.email,   ct.name as county,   p.state_code,   COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) as master_client,   COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, 'Not Assigned') AS consultant_name,   cp.tax_year,   COUNT(COALESCE(mc.name, c.name)) AS count_missing_tax_value,   'nova' as system_type FROM   main.public.nova_property p   JOIN main.public.nova_property_value pv ON p.id = pv.property_id   JOIN main.public.nova_client_property cp ON cp.property_id = p.id   JOIN main.public.nova_client c ON c.id = cp.client_id   JOIN main.public.nova_client mc ON mc.id = c.master_client_id   JOIN main.public.nova_users u ON c.assigned_user_id = u.id   JOIN main.public.nova_county ct on ct.id = p.county_id WHERE   pv.revised_taxable_value IS NULL   AND cp.tax_year >= 2025   AND pv.tax_year_short = cp.tax_year   AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY   u.id,   u.email,   ct.name,   p.state_code,   consultant_name,   master_client,   system_type,   cp.tax_year order by   count_missing_tax_value desc

metadata.description: Calculate the number of missing tax values (given by the filter revised_taxable_value IS NULL) by user/consultant by county by master client, for 2025.

input: Which users have the most missing jurisdictions for 2025 in Nova System?
query: SELECT   u.id AS user_id,   u.email,   ct.name as county,   p.state_code,   COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) as master_client,   COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, 'Not Assigned') AS consultant_name,   cp.tax_year,   COUNT(COALESCE(mc.name, c.name)) AS count_missing_jurisdictions,   'nova' as system_type FROM   main.public.nova_property p   JOIN main.public.nova_collector_account_number can ON can.property_id = p.id   JOIN main.public.nova_client_property cp ON cp.property_id = p.id   JOIN main.public.nova_client c ON c.id = cp.client_id   JOIN main.public.nova_client mc ON mc.id = c.master_client_id   LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_property_jurisdiction pj ON can.id = pj.collector_account_number_id   JOIN main.public.nova_users u ON c.assigned_user_id = u.id   LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_county ct on ct.id = p.county_id WHERE   pj.tax_entity_id IS NULL   AND cp.tax_year >= 2025   AND can.tax_year = cp.tax_year   AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY   u.id,   u.email,   ct.name,   p.state_code,   master_client,   consultant_name,   system_type,   cp.tax_year

metadata.description: Calculate the number of missing jurisdictions (given by the filter tax_entity_id IS NULL) by user/consultant by county by master client, for 2025.

input: Show a combined report of missing tax values and jurisdictions for 2025 in both Nova and TPT Systems.
query: SELECT   COALESCE(m.user_id, u.id) AS user_id,   COALESCE(m.email, u.email) AS email,   COALESCE(     m.consultant_name,     COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || u.last_name, 'Not Assigned')   ) AS consultant_name,   m.county,   m.state_code,   m.master_client,   m.tax_year,   m.system_type,   COALESCE(m.count_missing_tax_value, 0) AS count_missing_tax_value,   COALESCE(m.count_missing_jurisdictions, 0) AS count_missing_jurisdictions FROM   (     SELECT       COALESCE(mt.user_id, mj.user_id) AS user_id,       COALESCE(mt.email, mj.email) AS email,       COALESCE(mt.consultant_name, mj.consultant_name) AS consultant_name,       COALESCE(mt.county, mj.county) AS county,       COALESCE(mt.state_code, mj.state_code) AS state_code,       COALESCE(mt.master_client, mj.master_client) AS master_client,       COALESCE(mt.tax_year, mj.tax_year) AS tax_year,       COALESCE(mt.system_type, mj.system_type) AS system_type,       COALESCE(mt.count_missing_tax_value, 0) AS count_missing_tax_value,       COALESCE(mj.count_missing_jurisdictions, 0) AS count_missing_jurisdictions     FROM       dev.public.v_missing_tax_value_dd mt       FULL OUTER JOIN dev.public.v_missing_jurisdictions_dd mj ON mt.user_id = mj.user_id       AND mt.county = mj.county       AND mt.state_code = mj.state_code       AND mt.master_client = mj.master_client       AND mt.tax_year = mj.tax_year       AND mt.system_type = mj.system_type   ) m   LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_users u ON m.user_id = u.id WHERE   u.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY   count_missing_tax_value DESC

metadata.description: Combines missing_tax_values and missing_jurisdictions to create a report that gathers information of missing tax value and missing jurisdictions by user, county, master client for 2025.

input: Which bills were transmitted to collectors, including tax and rate details in Nova?
query: WITH property_tax_year_cte AS (   SELECT      p.id,     p.lease_number,     p.lease_name,     p.assessor_identifiers,     p.state_id,     p.field_id,     p.state_code,     p.county_id,     p.operator_id,     p.comment,     p.inactive_date,     p.appraisal_only,     p.client_id,     p.created_at,     p.updated_at,     p.owner_identifiers,     p.county2_id,     p.deleted_at,     p.collector_identifiers,     p.appraisal_firm_identifiers,     p.client_internal_identifiers,     p.is_cascade_archived,     c.id AS tax_year_client_id,     cp.tax_year AS cp_tax_year,     pv.interest_type,     pv.interest,     pv.appraisal_interest,     pv.assessed_interest,     pv.initial_market_value,     pv.initial_taxable_value,     pv.revised_market_value,     pv.revised_taxable_value   FROM main.public.nova_property p     LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client_property cp ON p.id = cp.property_id AND cp.tax_year = 2025     LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client c ON cp.client_id = c.id     LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_property_value pv ON p.id = pv.property_id AND cp.tax_year = pv.tax_year_short   WHERE cp.tax_year = 2025 OR cp.tax_year IS NULL ) SELECT    pv.tax_year,   c.name AS legal_entity,   col.state_code AS state,   col.contact AS collector,   p.client_internal_identifiers,   can.account_number AS collector_account_no,   p.state_id AS RRC,   p.lease_name,   p.lease_number,   pv.interest,   pv.interest_type,   mc.name AS master_client,   vcan.collector_account_value AS collector_acc_taxable_value,   vcan.total_tax_rate AS total_tax_rate_for_collector,   vcan.estimated_tax_due AS tax_due,   DATE(can.received_at) AS received_at,   can.processed_at FROM property_tax_year_cte p LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_collector_account_number can ON p.id = can.property_id AND can.tax_year = p.cp_tax_year LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_collector_account_number_calc_view vcan ON vcan.collector_account_number_id = can.id LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_collector col ON col.id = can.collector_id LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client c ON p.tax_year_client_id = c.id LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client mc ON c.master_client_id = mc.id LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_property_value pv ON pv.property_id = p.id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL    AND can.processed_at IS NOT NULL   AND pv.interest_type IS NOT NULL    AND c.deleted_at IS NULL    AND (mc.deleted_at IS NULL OR c.master_client_id IS NULL)   AND pv.tax_year_short = p.cp_tax_year ORDER BY p.lease_name

metadata.description: Show the bills that have been transmitted for each collector, for each client, with the tax values, tax rate for each collector. The filter can.processed_at IS NOT NULL selects records that represent processed bills.

input: What is the estimated tax due per property in Nova System?
query: SELECT p.id AS property_id,     sum(canv.estimated_tax_due) AS total_estimated_tax_due    FROM property p      JOIN collector_account_number can ON p.id = can.property_id AND can.tax_year = current_setting('myvars.selected_year'::text)::integer      JOIN collector_account_number_calc_view canv ON can.id = canv.collector_account_number_id   GROUP BY p.id

metadata.description: Gets the total estimated tax due for each property. The calculations for each estimated_tax_due comes from the collector_account_number_calc_view view.

input: What are the tax values calculated by each collector in Nova System?
query: SELECT can.id AS collector_account_number_id,     pv.initial_taxable_value,     pv.revised_taxable_value,     nt_round_up_2_decimals(COALESCE(pv.revised_taxable_value, pv.initial_taxable_value)::double precision * (can.split_rate / 100::double precision)) AS collector_account_value,     tax_data.total_tax_rate,     tax_data.estimated_tax_due    FROM collector_account_number can      JOIN property_value pv ON can.property_id = pv.property_id AND can.tax_year = pv.tax_year      LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT sum(pjv.tax_rate) AS total_tax_rate,             sum(pjv.calc_tax_due) AS estimated_tax_due            FROM property_jurisdiction_calc_view pjv           WHERE pjv.collector_account_number_id = can.id) tax_data ON true

metadata.description: Gets the tax rate and tax due by each collector. The calculation of tax due and tax rate comes from the property_jurisdiction_calc_view.

input: What is the taxable value and tax due per jurisdiction in Nova System?
query: WITH calc_values AS (          SELECT pj.id AS jurisdiction_id,             pj.collector_account_number_id,             ter.rate AS tax_rate,             ter.disc1,             ter.disc2,             ter.disc3,             ter.disc4,             COALESCE(pj.final_override, pv.revised_taxable_value::numeric, pv.initial_taxable_value::numeric) AS calc_taxable_value,             COALESCE(pj.split_rate_override, can.split_rate) AS calc_split_rate,             pj.tax_override            FROM property_jurisdiction pj              JOIN collector_account_number can ON pj.collector_account_number_id = can.id              JOIN property_value pv ON can.property_id = pv.property_id AND can.tax_year = pv.tax_year              JOIN tax_entity_rate ter ON pj.tax_entity_id = ter.tax_entity_id AND can.tax_year = ter.tax_year AND ter.deleted_at IS NULL         )  SELECT jurisdiction_id,     tax_rate,     calc_taxable_value,     calc_split_rate,     nt_round_up_2_decimals(calc_taxable_value::double precision * (calc_split_rate / 100::double precision)) AS calc_collector_value,         CASE             WHEN tax_override IS NOT NULL THEN tax_override             ELSE nt_round_2_decimals(calc_taxable_value::double precision * (calc_split_rate / 100::double precision) * (tax_rate / 100::numeric)::double precision)         END AS calc_tax_due,     disc1,     disc2,     disc3,     disc4,     collector_account_number_id    FROM calc_values

metadata.description: Calculates the tax due and gathers information about tax values like taxable value and tax rate by each jurisdiction, which is the lowest level of granularity.

input: What are the tax savings and the tax due (both initial and revised) for each client by county and state in Nova system for 2025?
query:
WITH property_tax_year_cte AS (
    SELECT
        p.id,
        p.state_code,
        p.state_id,
        p.county_id,
        p.client_id,
        u.email AS consultant,
        pv.interest_type AS property_type,
        COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) AS masterclientname,
        c1.name AS cdp_client,
        c.name AS legal_entity,
        c.id AS tax_year_client_id,
        cp.tax_year,
        ct.name AS county,
        pv.initial_market_value AS ProposedValue,
        pv.revised_market_value AS RevisedValue,
        pv.initial_taxable_value AS InitialTaxableValue,
        pv.revised_taxable_value AS RevisedTaxableValue
    FROM main.public.nova_property p
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client_property cp ON p.id = cp.property_id
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client c ON cp.client_id = c.id
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_client mc ON mc.id = c.master_client_id
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_users u ON mc.assigned_user_id = u.id
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_property_value pv ON p.id = pv.property_id AND cp.tax_year = pv.tax_year_short
    LEFT JOIN main.public.nova_county ct ON ct.id = p.county_id
    LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1 ON cca1.channel_entry_id = mc.id AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'nova'
    LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1 ON c1.id = cca1.client_id
    WHERE
        p.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND (cp.tax_year = 2025 OR cp.tax_year IS NULL)
        AND c.deleted_at IS NULL
        AND (mc.deleted_at IS NULL OR c.master_client_id IS NULL)
),

tax_calculation AS (
    SELECT
        p.tax_year,
        p.id AS property_id,
        p.state_code AS state,
        p.county,
        p.masterclientname,
        p.cdp_client,
        p.legal_entity,
        p.consultant,
        p.property_type,
        p.ProposedValue,
        p.RevisedValue,
        p.InitialTaxableValue,
        p.RevisedTaxableValue,
        SUM(ter.rate) AS total_rate,
        ROUND((
            COALESCE(p.RevisedTaxableValue, p.InitialTaxableValue)
            * COALESCE(pj.split_rate_override, can.split_rate) / 100
            * (ter.rate / 100)
        )::NUMERIC, 2) AS taxdue,
        ROUND((
            CASE
                WHEN p.RevisedTaxableValue IS NULL THEN 0
                ELSE (
                    p.InitialTaxableValue * (ter.rate / 100)
                    - p.RevisedTaxableValue * (ter.rate / 100)
                )
            END
        )::NUMERIC, 2) AS TaxSavings,
        ROUND(p.InitialTaxableValue * (ter.rate / 100), 2) AS initialTax,
        ROUND(p.RevisedTaxableValue * (ter.rate / 100), 2) AS revisedTax
    FROM property_tax_year_cte p
    JOIN main.public.nova_collector_account_number can ON can.property_id = p.id AND can.tax_year = p.tax_year
    JOIN main.public.nova_property_jurisdiction pj ON pj.collector_account_number_id = can.id
    JOIN main.public.nova_tax_entity_rate ter ON ter.tax_entity_id = pj.tax_entity_id
        AND ter.tax_year_short = p.tax_year
    WHERE
        can.account_number IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY
        p.tax_year,
        p.id,
        p.state_code,
        p.county,
        p.masterclientname,
        p.cdp_client,
        p.property_type,
        p.legal_entity,
        p.consultant,
        p.ProposedValue,
        p.RevisedValue,
        p.InitialTaxableValue,
        p.RevisedTaxableValue,
        pj.split_rate_override,
        can.split_rate,
        ter.rate
)

SELECT
    property_id,
    tax_year,
    state,
    county,
    masterclientname,
    COALESCE(cdp_client, masterclientname) as cdp_client,
    consultant,
    property_type,
    ProposedValue AS init_mkt,
    COALESCE(RevisedValue, ProposedValue) AS rev_mkt,
    InitialTaxableValue AS init_tax,
    COALESCE(RevisedTaxableValue, InitialTaxableValue) AS rev_tax,
    SUM(taxdue) AS taxdue,
    SUM(TaxSavings) AS TaxSavings,
    SUM(initialTax) AS initialTax,
    SUM(revisedTax) AS revisedTax,
    'nova' as system_type
FROM tax_calculation
GROUP BY
    property_id,
    tax_year,
    state,
    county,
    masterclientname,
    cdp_client,
    consultant,
    ProposedValue,
    RevisedValue,
    property_type,
    InitialTaxableValue,
    RevisedTaxableValue,
    system_type;

metadata.description: Calculate the tax savings and the tax due (both initial and revised) for each client by county and state in Nova system. It also picks the users/consultants that work with each client.

input: Generate a report that shows the number of notices by status (missing, accepted, pending, appealed) and the total values (market, taxable, assessed, equalized) by client, legal entity and county for current and prior year.
query: SELECT         (c.clientname || ' | ' || le.legalentityname || ' | ' || aa.assessorname || ' | ' || 'TPT | BPP' || ' | ' || p.stateprovincecode) AS keys,         aa.assessorname as assessor_name,         le.legalentityname as legal_entity_name,         COALESCE(c.clientname, le.legalentityname) AS client,         c.secondary_user AS consultant,         'BPP' as property_type,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('settled', 'accepted')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS accepted_notices,            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND (LOWER(aa.noticestatus) = 'missing' OR (aa.noticestatus IS NULL AND pp.ppnoticedetailid IS NULL))             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS missing_notices,            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('flagged for appeal', 'received', 'pending', 'appeal review')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS pending_notices,            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) = 'appealed'             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS appealed_notices,            COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('settled','accepted','missing','flagged for appeal','received','pending','appeal review','appealed')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS total_notices,           SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Taxable' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS taxable_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Market' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Assessed' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS assessed_value_cy,         0 as equalized_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Taxable' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS taxable_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Market' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND ppv.noticevaluetype = 'Assessed' THEN ppv.noticedvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS assessed_value_py,         0 as equalized_value_py,         co.office,         p.stateprovincecode as state,         c.clientid as client_id,         COALESCE(c1_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c1_sage.channel_entry_id,                             c2_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c2_sage.channel_entry_id                     ) AS customer_id,         'TPT' as system_type,         tdl.appealdeadline AS protest_date     FROM tpt_assessoraccounts aa     LEFT JOIN tpt_assessornames_earliest_deadlines tdl ON tdl.assessorname = aa.assessorname and tdl.stateprovincecode = aa.stateprovincecode     JOIN tpt_assessoraccount_property ap ON ap.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid     JOIN tpt_properties p ON p.propertyid = ap.propertyid     JOIN tpt_legalentities le ON le.legalentityid = p.legalentityid     LEFT JOIN tpt_clients c ON c.clientid = le.clientid     JOIN cdp.cdp.consultant_offices co ON LOWER(co.email) = LOWER(c.secondary_user)     LEFT JOIN tpt_ppnotices pp on pp.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid     LEFT JOIN tpt_ppnotice_values ppv ON ppv.ppnoticedetailid = pp.ppnoticedetailid        LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1         ON  cca1.channel_entry_id = le.clientid         AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'tpt'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1         ON  c1.id = cca1.client_id        LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca2         ON  cca2.channel_entry_id = le.legalentityid         AND cca2.channel_identifier = 'tpt'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2         ON  c2.id = cca2.client_id        -- c1 parent's SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1_parent         ON c1_parent.id = c1.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_parent_sage         ON c1_parent_sage.client_id = c1_parent.id         AND c1_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'        -- c1's own SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_sage         ON c1_sage.client_id = c1.id         AND c1_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'        -- c2 parent's association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2_parent         ON c2_parent.id = c2.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_parent_sage         ON c2_parent_sage.client_id = c2_parent.id         AND c2_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'        -- c2's own association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_sage         ON c2_sage.client_id = c2.id         AND c2_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       WHERE         aa.isactive = true         AND p.isactive = true         AND c.isactive = true         AND le.isactive = true         AND aa.assessoraccounttype in ('Personal Property', 'Pipeline')     GROUP BY         keys,         aa.assessorname,         consultant,         le.legalentityname,         COALESCE(c.clientname, le.legalentityname),         co.office,         p.stateprovincecode,         c.clientid,         le.legalentityid,         customer_id,         system_type,         protest_date     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 THEN aa.assessoraccountid END) > 0       UNION       -- TPT RENotices     SELECT         (c.clientname || ' | ' || le.legalentityname || ' | ' || aa.assessorname || ' | ' || 'TPT | RE' || ' | ' || p.stateprovincecode) AS keys,         aa.assessorname as assessor_name,         le.legalentityname as legal_entity_name,         COALESCE(c.clientname, le.legalentityname) AS client,         c.secondary_user AS consultant,         'RE' as property_type,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('settled', 'accepted')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS accepted_notices,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND (LOWER(aa.noticestatus) = 'missing' OR (aa.noticestatus IS NULL AND re.renoticedetailid IS NULL))             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS missing_notices,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('flagged for appeal', 'received', 'pending', 'appeal review')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS pending_notices,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) = 'appealed'             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS appealed_notices,           COUNT(DISTINCT CASE             WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025                 AND LOWER(aa.noticestatus) IN ('settled','accepted','missing','flagged for appeal','received','pending','appeal review','appealed')             THEN (aa.assessoraccountid::TEXT || '-' || p.propertyid::TEXT)         END) AS total_notices,           SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Taxable' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS taxable_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Market' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Assessed' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS assessed_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Equalized' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS equalized_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Taxable' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS taxable_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Market' THEN rev.adjustedtotalvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Assessed' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS assessed_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2024 AND rev.noticevaluetype = 'Equalized' THEN rev.landvalue::NUMERIC ELSE 0 END) AS equalized_value_py,         co.office,         p.stateprovincecode as state,         c.clientid as client_id,         COALESCE(c1_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c1_sage.channel_entry_id,                             c2_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c2_sage.channel_entry_id                     ) AS customer_id,         'TPT' as system_type,         tdl.appealdeadline AS protest_date     FROM tpt_assessoraccounts aa     LEFT JOIN tpt_assessornames_earliest_deadlines tdl ON tdl.assessorname = aa.assessorname and tdl.stateprovincecode = aa.stateprovincecode     JOIN tpt_assessoraccount_property ap ON ap.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid     JOIN tpt_properties p ON p.propertyid = ap.propertyid     JOIN tpt_legalentities le ON le.legalentityid = p.legalentityid     LEFT JOIN tpt_clients c ON c.clientid = le.clientid     JOIN cdp.cdp.consultant_offices co ON LOWER(co.email) = LOWER(c.secondary_user)     LEFT JOIN tpt_renotices re ON re.assessoraccountid = aa.assessoraccountid     LEFT JOIN tpt_renotice_values rev ON rev.renoticedetailid = re.renoticedetailid     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1         ON  cca1.channel_entry_id = le.clientid         AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'tpt'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1         ON  c1.id = cca1.client_id       LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca2         ON  cca2.channel_entry_id = le.legalentityid         AND cca2.channel_identifier = 'tpt'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2         ON  c2.id = cca2.client_id       -- c1 parent's SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1_parent         ON c1_parent.id = c1.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_parent_sage         ON c1_parent_sage.client_id = c1_parent.id         AND c1_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c1's own SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_sage         ON c1_sage.client_id = c1.id         AND c1_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c2 parent's association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2_parent         ON c2_parent.id = c2.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_parent_sage         ON c2_parent_sage.client_id = c2_parent.id         AND c2_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c2's own association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_sage         ON c2_sage.client_id = c2.id         AND c2_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       WHERE         aa.isactive = true         AND p.isactive = true         AND c.isactive = true         AND le.isactive = true         AND aa.assessoraccounttype in ('Real Estate', 'Mineral', 'Agricultural', 'Rendered Real Estate')     GROUP BY         keys,         aa.assessorname,         consultant,         le.legalentityname,         COALESCE(c.clientname, le.legalentityname),         co.office,         p.stateprovincecode,         property_type,         le.legalentityid,         c.clientid,         customer_id,         system_type,         protest_date     HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN aa.taxyear = 2025 THEN aa.assessoraccountid END) > 0       UNION       -- NOVA Notices     SELECT         COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) || ' | ' || c.name || ' | ' || ct.name || ' | ' ||'nova | mineral' || ' | ' || p.state_code AS keys,         ct.name as assessor_name,         c.name AS legal_entity_name,         COALESCE(mc.name, c.name) AS client,         u.email AS consultant,         'Mineral' AS property_type,         COUNT(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2025 AND initial_market_value IS NOT NULL AND revised_market_value IS NOT NULL THEN revised_market_value END) AS accepted_notices,         COUNT(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2025 AND initial_market_value IS NULL AND revised_market_value IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS missing_notices,         COUNT(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2025 AND initial_market_value IS NOT NULL AND revised_market_value IS NULL THEN initial_market_value END) AS pending_notices,         0 as appealed_notices,         COUNT(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2025 THEN 1 END) AS total_notices,         0 as taxable_value_cy,         SUM(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2025 THEN pv.revised_market_value ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_cy,         0 as assessed_value_cy,         0 as equalized_value_cy,         0 as taxable_value_py,         SUM(CASE WHEN pv.tax_year_short = 2024 THEN pv.revised_market_value ELSE 0 END) AS market_value_py,         0 as assessed_value_py,         0 as equalized_value_py,         co.office,         p.state_code as state,         mc.id AS client_id,         COALESCE(c1_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c1_sage.channel_entry_id,                             c2_parent_sage.channel_entry_id, c2_sage.channel_entry_id                     ) AS customer_id,         'Nova' AS system_type,         cd.appealdeadline as protest_date     FROM         nova_property p         JOIN nova_property_value pv ON pv.property_id = p.id         JOIN nova_client_property cp ON cp.property_id = p.id AND cp.tax_year = pv.tax_year_short         JOIN nova_client c ON c.id = cp.client_id         LEFT JOIN nova_client mc ON mc.id = c.master_client_id         LEFT JOIN nova_users u ON mc.assigned_user_id = u.id         JOIN cdp.cdp.consultant_offices co ON LOWER(co.email) = LOWER(u.email)         LEFT JOIN nova_county ct ON ct.id = p.county_id         LEFT JOIN nova_county_deadlines cd on ct.id = cd.county_id           LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca1         ON  cca1.channel_entry_id = mc.id         AND cca1.channel_identifier = 'nova'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1         ON  c1.id = cca1.client_id       LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS cca2         ON  cca2.channel_entry_id = c.id         AND cca2.channel_identifier = 'nova'     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2         ON  c2.id = cca2.client_id       -- c1 parent's SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c1_parent         ON c1_parent.id = c1.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_parent_sage         ON c1_parent_sage.client_id = c1_parent.id         AND c1_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c1's own SAGE association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c1_sage         ON c1_sage.client_id = c1.id         AND c1_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c2 parent's association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.clients AS c2_parent         ON c2_parent.id = c2.parent_id     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_parent_sage         ON c2_parent_sage.client_id = c2_parent.id         AND c2_parent_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       -- c2's own association     LEFT JOIN cdp.cdp.client_channel_associations AS c2_sage         ON c2_sage.client_id = c2.id         AND c2_sage.channel_identifier = 'sage'       WHERE         pv.tax_year_short >= 2024         AND p.deleted_at IS NULL         AND c.deleted_at IS NULL         AND u.deleted_at IS NULL         AND ct.deleted_at IS NULL     GROUP BY         keys,         client,         legal_entity_name,         consultant,         co.office,         p.state_code,         ct.name,         property_type,         mc.id,         c.id,         customer_id,         system_type,         protest_date ) SELECT     nr.keys,     nr.assessor_name,     nr.legal_entity_name,     nr.client,     nr.consultant as assigned_user,     nr.property_type,     nr.accepted_notices,     nr.missing_notices,     nr.pending_notices,     nr.appealed_notices,     nr.total_notices,     nr.taxable_value_cy,     nr.market_value_cy,     nr.assessed_value_cy,     nr.equalized_value_cy,     nr.taxable_value_py,     nr.market_value_py,     nr.assessed_value_py,     nr.equalized_value_py,     CASE         WHEN nr.market_value_py = 0         THEN NULL         ELSE             (nr.market_value_cy / nr.market_value_py) * 100     END AS yoy_market_value_pct,     nr.office,     nr.state,     nr.client_id,     nr.customer_id,     nr.system_type,     nr.protest_date FROM     notices_tbl nr ORDER BY total_notices DESC

metadata.description: Gets the number of notices of each status (missing, accepted, pending, appealed) and the totals by each client, legal entity and county, and also gets the aggregated values (market value, taxable value, assessed and equalized values)  for each combination of client, legal entity and county for the current year and prior year.

input: How many open renditions and total renditions are there for each consultant by client, legal entity and assessor?
query: SELECT                 assessor.taxyear,                 assessor.stateprovincecode,                 clients.secondary_user AS assigned_user,                 clients.clientid,                 clients.clientname,                 clients.clientnumber,                 legalentities.legalentityname,                 legalentities.legalentitynumber,                 legalentities.legalentityid,                 assessor.assessorname,                 COALESCE(SUM(returns.cyrenderedvalue), 0) AS rendered_value,                 COALESCE(SUM(returns.cyopinionofvalue), 0) AS opinion_value,                 COALESCE(SUM(                     CASE                         WHEN assessor.assessoraccounttype != 'Personal Property' THEN 0 -- Only Personal Property can be set as done in TPT                         WHEN returns.returnstatus IN ('Filed', 'Filed Externally') THEN 0                         ELSE 1                     END                 ), 0) AS open_renditions,                 count(assessor.assessorname) AS total_renditions             FROM tpt_clients AS clients                 JOIN tpt_legalentities AS legalentities                     ON legalentities.clientid = clients.clientid                     AND legalentities.isactive = TRUE                 JOIN tpt_properties AS properties                     ON properties.legalentityid = legalentities.legalentityid                     AND properties.isactive = TRUE                 JOIN tpt_assessoraccount_property AS assessor_property                     ON assessor_property.propertyid = properties.propertyid                 JOIN tpt_assessoraccounts AS assessor                     ON assessor.assessoraccountid = assessor_property.assessoraccountid                     AND assessor.isactive = TRUE                 LEFT JOIN tpt_returns AS returns                     ON returns.assessoraccountid = assessor.assessoraccountid             WHERE                 clients.isactive = TRUE                 AND assessor.taxyear = $this->taxYear             GROUP BY                 assessor.taxyear,                 assessor.stateprovincecode,                 clients.secondary_user,                 clients.clientname,                 clients.clientnumber,                 clients.clientid,                 legalentities.legalentityname,                 legalentities.legalentitynumber,                 legalentities.legalentityid,                 assessor.assessorname

metadata.description: Gets the number of open renditions and the total for each combination of client, legal_entity and assessor by each user/consultant.
